name: orca-role-orchestration
description: Four-role Orca Agent IDE orchestration: Claude Opus architect, GPT Sol executor, Grok thrifty, Gemini Flash fallback. Project scaffold, playbook, and supervised dispatch.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-model role routing for Orca: architect, executor, thrifty, fallback
interface.longDescription: Use Orca role orchestration to route work by model strength: Claude Opus for architecture and review, GPT Sol (Codex) for hard implementation, Grok for cheap exploration, and Gemini Flash only as rate-limit fallback. Includes installable project scaffold, personas, and supervised dispatch scripts.
defaultPrompt: Set up Orca multi-model role orchestration for this project.
Route this work with orca-role-orchestration (architect / executor / thrifty).
